name: Swiss Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt butter and saute onion and green pepper for about 5 minutes.
2. Add beef and cook over high heat until brown.
3. Add tomatoes, salt, and pepper to the pan.
4. Cover and simmer on low heat for 1 hour.
5. Stir in cubed Swiss cheese and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
6. Mix in cooked spaghetti and toss until combined.
7. Serve with grated Swiss cheese sprinkled on top.
